meaning: n.阿拉伯酋长(贵族、王公)之职位或阶级,酋长国
examples: But Dubai, which has no oil, was backed by its Arab emirate neighbors.
The $3.2 million billboard will be unveiled in the Emirate next spring.
The announcement threw the emirate and the global credit markets into a vertiginous free fall.
The emirate also has a thriving private-sector middle class, but it consists almost entirely of foreigners.
While the UAE is relatively liberal among Gulf nations, Sharjah is its most conservative emirate.
